title: Borzoi Dogs
body:
![logo](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/782679090876121140/1070426270074151054/psdpsy_2_2.gif?width=1193&height=676)

**GeckoLib** 🦎

> This mod requires [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib), otherwise it will not work.

**Borzoi Dogs** 🐕

> This mod simply adds our beloved long nose Borzoi Dogs into Minecraft!
They work just like vanilla minecraft dogs, you can tame them, feed them and they will follow and defend you.
